title: Simple ribbed hat
gaugeText: 20 sts × 26 rounds = 10 × 10 cm in 2×2 rib slightly stretched, on 5 mm needles.
finishedSizeText: Adult head circumference 56 cm × height 24 cm.
sources: Weldon's Practical Knitting, 12th series, §Ribbed cap — the 2×2 ribbed adult hat is one of the longest-running patterns in the Weldon's catalogue
Mary Thomas's Knitting Book (1938), §Knitting in the round + §Crown shaping
notes: Next-step beginner: introduces knitting in the round (40 cm circular), 2×2 ribbing, and a simple k2tog-based crown decrease. Sizes for child (50 cm) and adult-large (60 cm) named as variations. No chart needed; the rib is read from the prose.
